name: Aurora Jets
lore: One of the league's two founding clubs, the Jets were built around the idea that a team moving faster than the opponent's read speed does not need to be stronger, just never still.

name: Lunar Pilots
lore: The Pilots emphasize ball control, catch-first positioning, and the discipline of waiting for an opponent to make the first mistake.

name: Nebula Sentinels
lore: The Sentinels build around stamina and physical endurance, proving that a second-wave club can outlast founding franchises.

name: Vanguard Storm
lore: The Storm lean into high-profile signings, aggressive recruiting, synchronized throws, and high-pressure ball-carrier targeting.

name: Echo Orbit
lore: The Orbit develop quietly through an internal scouting network that finds players nobody else is watching.

name: Blaze Flux
lore: The Flux build power-forward lineups and prioritize elimination rate over survival time.

name: Atlas Surge
lore: The Surge favor balanced players over specialists and are built to protect late leads.

name: Circuit Hawks
lore: The Hawks are the league's most analytically driven franchise and were first to track scouting state across multiple recruit classes before signing.
